vulnerabilities.description: Missing security middleware such as Helmet for setting HTTP headers and Rate Limiting for controlling the request rate.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate Helmet and a rate-limiting library like express-rate-limit.

vulnerabilities.description: CORS is not configured with a whitelist to restrict resource sharing to trusted origins.
vulnerabilities.fix: Set up CORS with a specific whitelist of allowed domains.

vulnerabilities.description: JWT secret is accessed without validation, potentially leading to security issues if improperly set in environment.
vulnerabilities.fix: Use a validation library like Zod to ensure JWT_SECRET is properly set and valid.

vulnerabilities.description: Lack of explicit logging showing inclusion of sensitive data.
vulnerabilities.fix: Review logging practices to ensure that sensitive data like passwords or JWT tokens are not logged. Use libraries like Winston or Pino.

vulnerabilities.description: No Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) implemented for endpoint permission checks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement RBAC or ABAC middleware to enforce user permissions.
